title: Articles (der, die, das)
description: Every noun has a gender! Learn how to use 'the' correctly for men, women, and things.
explanation: In German, words aren't just words—they have genders! Masculine (der), Feminine (die), and Neuter (das). It sounds tricky, but there's a trick to it. Plus, when things become plural, they all use 'die'!

tables.title: The Big Three Articles
tables.note: Tip: Always learn a new word WITH its article. Don't just learn 'Tisch', learn 'der Tisch'!

deep_notes.title: The Plural Cheat Code
deep_notes.text:
It doesn't matter if the word was der, die, or das—once it becomes plural, the article becomes 'die'. 
Example: der Tisch -> die Tische.

exercises.explanation: Mann is masculine, so we use 'der'!

exercises.question: Welcher Artikel ist für 'Frau'?
exercises.explanation: Frau is feminine, so it takes 'die'!
Kind is neuter, so we use 'das'!

exercises.question: Was ist der Plural von 'der Tisch'?
Was ist der richtige Artikel für 'Auto'?
Ordne den Satz:
exercises.explanation: Even masculine words use 'die' when they become plural (Männer)!

exercises.question: Welches Paar ist richtig?
exercises.explanation: die Tasche is the only correct pair!
